title: Trump's 'Alien in Chains' Truth Social Post Goes Viral Following Pentagon UFO File Release
description: Trump's 'alien in chains' Truth Social post goes viral after Pentagon UFO file release sparks renewed public interest in UAP disclosures.

title: Second UFO Sphere Recovered Deep in Jungle After Elderly Couple Sighting
description: An elderly couple in Colombia witnessed a glowing metallic sphere, dubbed the 'Valdivia Sphere', descend into a jungle. Investigators later retrieved the object, sparking UFO community interest and speculation.

title: Do Aliens Exist? UFO Files Show No Strong Evidence of Alien Life, Says Analyst Mick West (Video)
description: The US Department of Defense has released around 160 declassified files on UFOs or unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP), including historical reports, photos, and videos from the 1940s onward. The documents were posted online on May 8, 2026. Analyst Mick West examined the batch and reported no evidence of extraterrestrial technology.

title: JJRC H145 UFO RC Quadcopter Review: Durable, Fun, and Full of Features

title: Reptilians and Insectoids: Ex-CIA Scientist Reveals Specific Alien Species Recovered from UFO Crashes
description: Former CIA-funded researcher Hal Puthoff says trusted insiders told him four alien species are linked to recovered UFO craft, including 'Reptilians and Insectoids,' but offers no direct evidence.
